data.title: US House Speaker Johnson: We will enshrine DOGE spending cuts into law
data.description: Johnson, Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives: If you do the math right, the tax bill will reduce the deficit. We will write DOGE spending cuts into law. DOGE regulation will become a permanent function of government.

data.title: U.S. appeals court reinstates Trump tariffs pending appeal
data.description: Market News: U.S. Court of Appeals reinstated Trump's tariff measures pending appeal.

data.title: U.S. House Speaker Johnson Discusses Tax Bill's Impact on Deficit Reduction
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. House Speaker Johnson stated that if calculations are accurate, the tax bill will reduce the deficit. He mentioned that the expenses cut related to DOGE will be incorporated into law. Additionally, the regulation of DOGE will become a permanent function of the government.

data.title: Rising U.S. Government Debt Concerns Bond Traders
data.description: According to Odaily, Goldman Sachs President John Waldron has expressed growing concern among bond traders regarding the increasing levels of U.S. government debt. Waldron noted that this issue has now become a greater risk than tariffs. He stated, "Although all attention was previously focused on tariffs, I believe the focus is indeed shifting, especially in the bond market, towards the U.S. budget debate and fiscal conditions, which I find somewhat concerning." Waldron emphasized that the greatest macroeconomic risk currently is no longer tariffs.

data.title: SEC Task Force Chief Says Crypto Traders Need to be Growups, Not Cry to Government
data.description:
LAS VEGAS, Nevada — You shouldn't be a crypto libertarian that comes crying for government help when things go badly, according to Hester Peirce, the chief of the crypto task force at the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission."I do think that sometimes, when something bad happens in this space, people who are remarkably free thinkers, libertarian-minded people, come in and say, ‘Where was the government? Why weren’t you protecting me? Hey, Crypto Mom, where’s my bailout?'" she told a crowd at Bitcoin 2025 in Las Vegas, referring to her industry nickname
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/05/29/sec-task-force-chief-says-crypto-traders-need-to-be-growups-not-cry-to-government

data.title: Stand With Crypto Removes Soulja Boy From NJ Governor Rally After Discovering Sexual Assault Fine
data.description:
Rapper Soulja Boy will no longer perform at Stand With Crypto's "get out the vote" event in Jersey City next week due to a court finding him liable for sexual battery and assault, a spokesperson told CoinDesk on Thursday.Soulja Boy, otherwise known as DeAndre Cortez Way, and 070 Shake, otherwise known as Danielle Balbuena, were slated to headline the event on June 5, which was intended to bring out crypto fans a few weeks before New Jersey residents go to the polls to choose their nominees for the Garden State's governor race, Stand With Crypto announced on Wednesday.Stand With Crypto New Jersey chapter president Carlos Merino said in a statement that "This GOTV rally is one more example of Stand With Crypto's commitment to mobilizing the crypto community ahead of New Jersey's critical gubernatorial primary election."However, Way will no longer perform after Politico reported Thursday morning that he was recently ordered to pay a former assistant $4 million after being found liable for sexual battery and assault
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/05/29/stand-with-crypto-removes-soulja-boy-from-nj-governor-rally-after-discovering-sexual-assault-fine

data.title: Musk says no deal signed with Telegram despite Grok integration announcement
data.description:
Elon Musk stated on May 28 that xAI had not signed an agreement with Telegram to distribute the Grok large language model, despite Telegram founder Pavel Duvov’s announcement earlier on the same day.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/musk-says-no-deal-signed-with-telegram-despite-grok-integration-announcement/

data.title: Donut raises $7 million to build AI-driven crypto browser
data.description:
Donut, a new crypto-native browser purpose-built for autonomous agents, announced on May 29 that it has secured $7 million in pre-seed funding to reimagine how users and AI interact with the decentralized web.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/donut-raises-7-million-to-build-ai-driven-crypto-browser/

data.title: BlackRock Reportedly Targeting Major Stake in Upcoming Crypto IPO
data.description:
Circle, the issuer behind the USDC stablecoin, is preparing to go public, and sources say BlackRock is gearing up to take a significant piece of the action—possibly acquiring 10% of the offering.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/blackrock-reportedly-targeting-major-stake-in-upcoming-crypto-ipo/

data.title: Russian Crypto Couple Rescued After $43,000 Bitcoin Kidnapping – Suspects Flee to UAE as Interpol Issues Red Notice
data.description:
The Russian crypto couple kidnapped in Buenos Aires has been freed after a $43,000 Bitcoin ransom transferred by a third Russian. Police have said the Chechen suspects have flown to the UAE; Interpol notices have been issued as part of a wider probe into rising crypto-linked abductions.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russian-crypto-couple-kidnapped-interpol-uae-red-notice/

data.title: US Corporate Profits Fall By 42% In Q1 As High Cost Threaten Companies
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 29, 2025– US corporate profits fell by 42% quarter-over-quarter in the first quarter, official data showed on Thursday, and risks from tariffs-related costs could continue throughout the year. Commerce Department’s Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) said that profits from current production with inventory valuation and capital consumption adjustments dropped $118. 1 billion last […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-corporate-profits-fall-by-42-in-q1-as-high-cost-threaten-companies

data.title: Symbiotic and Cap Introduce Collateral-Backed Stablecoin for Market Makers
data.description:
TL;DR Cap and Symbiotic launch Universal Staking: agents borrow funds for investments like arbitrage and market making, while stakers lock capital as collateral. When agreed returns aren’t met, automatic slashing is triggered on the operator’s collateral, covering the shortfall and preserving the stablecoin’s peg. Symbiotic’s vaults only authorize withdrawals if collateral is active and enforce.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/symbiotic-and-cap-introduce-collateral-backed-stablecoin-for-market-makers/
